message.content:
@startuml
actor "User Agent" as UA
participant "Content removal API" as CRA
participant "User Manager" as UM
database "User database" as UDB
database "Content database" as CDB

note right of UA
Should also include a CSRF token to prevent admins who are also
visit other, potentially XSS vulnerable or malicious sites
from helping an unkown actor remove content without authorization.
end note

UA -> CRA: Removal request (HTTP POST),\ncontains ID of content to be removed.
activate CRA
CRA -> UM: Retrieve role of requesting user.
activate UM
UM -> UDB: Fetch user information from database.
activate UDB
UDB --> UM: Return query result.
deactivate UDB
UM --> CRA: Return user role.
deactivate UM

alt [User has admin role]
    CRA -> CRA: Validate removal request
    alt [Failed to validate removal request]
        CRA --> UA: Return an HTTP status code that signals validation failure.\nExact value depends on how the validation failed.
    else [Request is deemed valid]
        CRA -> CDB: Remove content from DB.
        activate CDB
        CDB --> CRA: Result of delete operation
        deactivate CDB
        alt [Content has been removed succesfully]
            CRA --> UA: Return HTTP 204 No Content
        else [Removal failed]
            CRA --> UA: Return HTTP Status code to signal reason for failure.
        end
    end
else [User is not authorized to remove content]
    CRA --> UA: Return HTTP 403 Forbidden to signal that the user has no permission to request what they just did.
end
deactivate CRA

@enduml
